notes: Game tries to start and crashes while loading.
title: Undead Horde

notes: Using Steam Runtime, game would launch, but crashed upon clicking necromance.
title: Undead Horde

notes: starts up to the menu, can configure all options, change resolution etc. but instant crash to desktop when clicking on Necromance. no_esync = crash to desktop when clicking necromance. use_wined3d = black screen crash, must kill process. no_d3d11 = doesn't start at all.
title: Undead Horde

notes:
I promised to collect proton/wine logs for the devs, because the game used to crash when pressing Necromance. But then the game worked.

Incidentally the game also has a native version now (in beta) but is the default version if you try to play on linux. The store only lists Windows, but Linux listing will be added later. Forcing proton version downloads the Windows version instead. But now it works. Both the native and the windows version in proton.
title: Undead Horde
